ai_result.title: Delta, PA: Rescue Training
ai_result.summary: Attendees will learn and practice skills such as wet exit, partner rescue, self-rescue, and emptying a kayak when it takes on water.

ai_result.title: Havre de Grace: Paddle to the Lighthouse and the Bay
ai_result.summary: Join Michelle for a paddle to the Lighthouse and the Bay in Havre de Grace.

ai_result.title: Susquehanna River: Intermediate-level paddle
ai_result.summary: Join Katie for an intermediate-level paddle on the Susquehanna River, exploring Muddy Creek and river islands.

ai_result.title: Dundalk: Paddle around Dundalk
ai_result.summary: Join Michelle for a laid-back two-hour paddle at a beginner-friendly slow-moderate pace.

ai_result.title: Chesapeake Harbour: Paddle to Back Creek
ai_result.summary: Join a paddle from Chesapeake Harbour to Back Creek with music and sunset views.

ai_result.title: Fells Point: Kayak availability may be limited
ai_result.summary: New-member orientation will use club kayaks.

ai_result.title: Delta, PA: Susquehanna islands tour
ai_result.summary: Join Michelle for a 3-hour tour of the Susquehanna islands and natural elements of the mighty river.

ai_result.title: CKC Social – Lighthouse Canton
ai_result.summary: Join the Canton Kayak Club for a social event at Lighthouse Canton.
